faq.title: Get Paid to Install Apps in {country} - FAQ

items.question: How much can I earn from installing apps?
items.answer: Each app install pays between $0.50 and $15. Most members earn $50-$200 per month, but active users make $300+ by installing 10-20 apps daily.

items.question: Is it really free to join?
items.answer: Yes! Cashog is 100% free to join. You never need to pay anything. Just download apps, try them, and get paid.

items.question: How do I get paid for installing apps?
items.answer: You can cash out via PayPal, bank transfer, Bitcoin, Ethereum, or gift cards (Amazon, Apple, Google Play, Robux, Steam, Xbox, PlayStation). Minimum payout is just $5.

items.question: Do I need to keep the apps installed?
items.answer: No! You only need to open the app and keep it installed for 30-60 seconds. After that, you can delete it. Your reward is yours to keep.

items.question: Does this work on iPhone and Android?
items.answer: Yes! Cashog works on both iOS (iPhone, iPad) and Android devices. Most offers work on both platforms.

items.question: Is Cashog available in my country?
items.answer: Cashog is available in over 50 countries including the US, Canada, UK, Australia, Germany, France, Spain, Italy, and many more. Sign up for free to check app install offers in {country}.
